subject: Mathematics
activityTitle: M ETHOD   OF   C ONSTRUCTION 1. Take a rectangular sheet of a hardboard of a convenient size and paste a
objective:
To construct an ellipse when two fixed
points are given.
Rectangular cardboard, coloured
chart paper, nails, strings, pen,
pencil.
discussion:
This activity may be used in constructing elliptical designs using thread work and
also in explaining concepts such as major and minor axis of an ellipse.
